narrative:
Boardman Local Sd (Mahoning) school district has 25,962 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 17.6 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +6.6% D−R vs +21.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
